description: Scala para Termux no Android ARM64. Inclui o compilador Scala via coursier (launcher JAR + Java) e Metals (LSP) para autocompletar, diagnósticos e navegação de código.

install_steps.command: pkg update -y 2>&1 && pkg install -y openjdk-17 curl 2>&1

mkdir -p $HOME/.local/bin && curl -fL https://github.com/coursier/launchers/raw/master/coursier -o $HOME/.local/bin/cs.jar 2>&1 && echo '#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash\nexec java -jar "$HOME/.local/bin/cs.jar" "$@"' > $HOME/.local/bin/cs && chmod +x $HOME/.local/bin/cs && echo 'OK: coursier (JAR launcher) instalado'
install_steps.description: Instalando coursier via launcher JAR (compatível com Android)

install_steps.command: export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.local/bin && cs setup --yes 2>&1 && echo 'OK: coursier setup concluído'
export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.local/share/coursier/bin && cs install scala-cli 2>&1 && echo 'OK: scala-cli instalado'
export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.local/share/coursier/bin && cs install metals 2>&1 && echo 'OK: Metals LSP instalado'

config_steps.command: test -f $HOME/.local/share/coursier/bin/metals && echo 'metals OK' || test -f $HOME/.local/bin/metals && echo 'metals OK' || echo 'AVISO: metals não encontrado'

sdk_config.new_project_cmd: mkdir -p $name && cd $name && printf '@main def main(): Unit =\n  println("Hello, World!")\n' > Main.scala
